title: # Start Kernel Orchestration Start Kernel orchestration for the current task inside this Codex session. Execute immediately. Do not create or edit GitHub issues, pull requests, review comments, or issue comments. Do not inspect CI unless explicitly asked later. Backup-only GitHub Actions dispatch or...
summary_text: `BLOCKED` の「exact semantics（requested action / active lanes / missing lanes / exact reason）」は、実行コードではなく prompt 定義から出ています。 - 発生源（完全一致）: [~/.codex/prompts/kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L32) 条件: - baseline model set または lane minimum が欠けたとき `BLOCKED` を返す - `BLOCKED` に `requested action, active lanes, missing lanes, exact reason` を必須化 参照: [kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L32), [kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L33) - repo-local `/kernel` `/k` の `BLOCKED` 定義（別文言）: [repo kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L44), [repo k.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/k.md#L47) 条件: - bootstrap で 6 active lanes を素早く作れない場合 - 出力要求は `active lanes, missing lanes, exact bootstrap reason` - `/vote` 側の `BLOCKED` 定義: [~/.codex/prompts/vote.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/vote.md#L30) 条件: - Claude or GLM unavailable - planning/adjudication quorum 不足 - missing lane / veto reason を含めて明示 - 実装コード側（guard/launcher/scripts）には、この structured `BLOCKED` を直接生成する本流ロジックは見当たりません。 `BLOCKED` を実際に `echo` しているのはサンプルのみ: [consensus-vote-stub.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/examples/consensus-vote-stub.sh#L85)
